task: B5 (capstone): rework approveCashAdvanceRequest into the link+post cascade orchestrating B2/B3/B4. On approval the advance routes 1) active load with open driver_bill -> link to that bill, 2) else open driver_bill -> link to it, 3) else employee LOAN; all branches post via B3 driver_advance (Dr QBO-149/Cr cash), keep createSettlementDeduction recovery, fire B4 approved+posted timeline emits, honor an optional role-gated posting_date.
details: Cascade in approveCashAdvanceRequest (office path only): active load (mdata.loads.assigned_primary_driver_id, status in dispatched/at_pickup/in_transit/at_delivery) WITH an open driver_finance.driver_bills for it -> linkedDriverBillId; else any open driver_bill; else employee loan (createEmployeeLoanCore, no bill link). Fork 3: active load but no open bill falls through to branch 2 then 3 (no speculative bill creation).

Fork 4(a): ONE posting path — all branches post via B3 driver_advance engine (Dr QBO-149 / Cr cash). Branches differ only in the driver_bill linkage (new driver_advances.linked_driver_bill_id column, migration 202606130556) + recovery.
Fork 5: keep BOTH recoveries — createSettlementDeduction (cash_advance_repayment netting line, all 3 branches) AND the B3 deduction_schedule amortization.

Fork 6/7: post AT APPROVAL — the approve tx commits (advance+link+status+deduction+B4 approved emit), then the route calls disburseDriverAdvanceCore (separate, idempotent tx; B2 idempotency key + 'approved'->'disbursed' status guard prevent double/lost posts; fires B4 'posted'). Optional posting_date back-dating is role-gated (isOwnerOrAdmin) — disburse gate made CONDITIONAL on posting_date so Manager/Accountant/Dispatcher approvers can disburse at today's date.

Validated: cascade unit tests 5/5 (3 branches + Fork-3 fall-through + deduction/emit), disburse tests updated (conditional gate, non-owner default-date disburse, Fork-7 second-disburse 409), typecheck 0, CI_MIGRATION_TEST=1 verify:db:reset 0. Existing approve behavior preserved where not intentionally changed.
known_gaps: Fork 1 (documented, not silent): approveHubCashAdvanceRequest (driver-hub-requests.service.ts) is NOT reworked into the cascade in B5 — it stays deduction-only to limit live-money surface. Unifying the Hub path into the cascade is a candidate follow-up block.
